name: muninn
description: HNSW vector search, graph algorithms, Node2Vec, and GGUF embedding + LLM inference — all inside SQLite via a single C11 extension. Ships nine task-granular skills covering setup, vector search, text embeddings, LLM extraction, graph algorithms, dbt-style lineage, Node2Vec, GraphRAG pipelines, and troubleshooting across SQLite CLI, C, Python, Node.js, and WASM.

interface.shortDescription: Vector search, graph algorithms, and LLM inference in SQLite
interface.longDescription: sqlite-muninn is a C11 SQLite extension that registers HNSW vector indexes, graph traversal / centrality / Leiden community TVFs, Node2Vec training, GGUF embedding (muninn_embed), and GGUF LLM chat + structured extraction (muninn_chat, muninn_extract_entities, muninn_extract_relations, muninn_summarize) — all callable as SQL. This plugin bundles nine task-granular skills that teach Codex the correct invocation patterns for each subsystem across SQLite CLI, C, Python, Node.js, and WASM runtimes.
defaultPrompt: Add semantic search to my SQLite database using muninn
Run Leiden community detection on my edge table
Build a GraphRAG pipeline entirely in SQL with local GGUF models
Extract entities and relations from text via muninn_extract_ner_re
Troubleshoot a muninn load error on macOS Python
